title: Daily Number Line iteration
description:
Daily iteration loop for Number Line. Local repo cwd: /Users/adreanpalafox/Documents/number-line (git remote: https://github.com/adPalafox/number-line).

Loop (run each day):
1) Sync: cd to local repo, git status, git fetch, pull/rebase as appropriate.
2) Review: read current project board/issues; pick 1-3 highest-leverage items; define today's outcome.
3) Plan gate (HUMAN SIGN-OFF): if scope/strategy changes, draft plan + ask human approval before major direction changes.
4) Design gate (HUMAN SIGN-OFF): if UX/UI changes, propose design + acceptance criteria; wait for approval before implementing.
5) Build: implement smallest slice, keep commits small, run tests/lint, update docs.
6) QA gate (HUMAN SIGN-OFF): create/execute test plan; request approval before release.
7) Release gate (HUMAN SIGN-OFF): tag/release/deploy steps; verify smoke checks.
8) Marketing gate (HUMAN SIGN-OFF): draft announcement/social posts and distribution checklist; wait approval before publishing.
9) Wrap: summarize progress, blockers, next-day plan; ensure repo clean.
